messages.content: You are a chemistry model specialized in mass spectrometry. In this task, estimate the intensity of fragments based on their mass, structure, and likely ionization behavior.

<<TASK=IterativeIntensityFragPrediction>> You predicted the intensity scores (1–10) for provided fragments (ordered by descending intensity). 0 were either incorrect or not included. Provide the intensity of each fragment of the molecules under the specified experiment settings and return the exact corresponding m/z values listed here too. The included intensity values were provided by you in the previous response:
<<MOL>> [C][O][C][=Branch1][C][=O][C][=C][C][=C][Branch2][Ring2][#Branch1][N][C][=Branch1][C][=O][C][C][Branch2][Ring1][Branch2][N][Branch1][N][C][=Branch1][C][=O][C][=C][C][=C][O][Ring1][Branch1][C][C][C][C][C][C][C][Ring1][#Branch1][C][Ring2][Ring1][Branch1][=O][C][=C][Ring2][Ring1][N]
<<EXP_SETTINGS>> {adduct: [M+H]+, instrument: Orbitrap, collision_energy: 75.0}
[{'frag': '[N][C][=C][C][=C][C][=C][Ring1][=Branch1]', 'mz': 94.07, 'int': 10}, {'frag': '[C][=C][C][=C][C][=C][Ring1][=Branch1]', 'mz': 79.05, 'int': 2}, {'frag': '[C][C][C][=O]', 'mz': 59.05, 'int': 1}, {'frag': '[C][C][C][C]', 'mz': 59.09, 'int': 1}]
